_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Apply service oriented security architecture principles to meet organization's confidentiality, integrity, and availability requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.499), SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.489).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.509). Shared vocabulary: [principles, service]. DCWF-only terms [apply, architecture, availability, confidentiality, integrity, meet] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.886, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Apply service oriented security architecture principles to meet organization's c" and "Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.528 ≈ STS 0.509 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [principles, service] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [principles, service]. DCWF-only: [apply, architecture, availability, confidentiality, integrity, meet]. WIDAI-only: [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement].
